Provide project context and coding guidelines that AI should follow when generating code, answering questions, or reviewing changes.

## Coding Guidelines

- **Use Hero UI components**: When implementing UI elements, prefer using Hero UI components whenever possible to ensure consistency and accessibility.
- **Tailwind CSS for styling**: Use Tailwind CSS for styling, adhering to the project's design system and utility-first approach.
- **Mock data for development**: When real data is unavailable, use mock data to simulate functionality and ensure seamless development.
- Avoid using hardcoded values in the code. Instead, use constants or configuration files to manage such values for better maintainability and scalability. Or predifned values like instead of setting rounded-[28px], use rounded-xl, rounded-2xl, etc.
